body.value: 藩制一覧表第五 （久留米）
藩制一覧表 第五冊（久留米藩）

Running page header in the outer margin: Domain Survey (Hansei Ichiran), fifth fascicle — the civil/economic register — Kurume section. Provenance label, not data; it names the domain whose entry opens to its right. The printed page number 三百八十五 (385) is in the bottom margin.
Page header (藩制一覧表第五 久留米)
風帆船
風帆船（ふうはんせん）＝帆船

Field heading 'sail-rigged ships' (fūhansen) for the PREVIOUS domain, Kumamoto/Higo. It prints to the RIGHT of the ○久留米藩 boundary marker, so it and its value belong to Kumamoto, not Kurume. This is the short Kumamoto tail closing that domain's entry.
風帆船 header（熊本）
二艘 一原カゴシマ 和名神風丸 英製木船 二原コリヤ 和名泰運丸 米製木船
二艘（にそう）— 一は原カゴシマ（鹿児島）、和名「神風丸」、英国製の木造船／二は原コリヤ、和名「泰運丸」、米国製の木造船

Two sailing ships (二艘) held by Kumamoto/Higo, with a hanging double-column gloss giving each vessel's provenance, Japanese name, and build: ship 1 originally from Kagoshima, named Shinpū-maru, a British-made wooden ship; ship 2 originally from 'Koria', named Taiun-maru, an American-made wooden ship. This is the only Kumamoto value on the page; it sits right of the boundary marker.
風帆船（熊本）
○久留米藩
○久留米藩（くるめはん）
Domain-boundary marker: the maru (○) plus han name opens the Kurume entry. Everything to its RIGHT (higher x) is the preceding Kumamoto domain's tail; everything to its LEFT is Kurume.
Boundary marker ○久留米藩
本高二十一萬石
本高（ほんだか）二十一万石
Small gloss printed directly beneath the ○久留米藩 marker: honkoku (registered/nominal domain rank) = 210,000 koku. This is Kurume's bakumatsu official assessment (久留米藩 was a 21-万-石 domain).
本高
草高 三拾六萬六千貳百七拾壹石七斗一升 新田高改共
草高（くさだか）三十六万六千二百七十一石七斗一升（新田高改め共）

Gross registered land yield (kusadaka) = 366,271 koku 7 to 1 sho, the gloss 新田高改共 noting it includes the re-surveyed new-paddy yield (shinden-daka). Well above the 210,000-koku nominal rank, as is typical for Kurume.
草高
正税 拾壹萬七千貳百七拾九石九斗三升貳合四勺五才
正税（せいぜい）十一万七千二百七十九石九斗三升二合四勺五才
Regular (land) tax = 117,279 koku 9 to 3 sho 2 go 4 shaku 5 sai. About one-third of the 366,271-koku kusadaka, consistent with the page's gen-mai note reckoning revenue at roughly a third.
正税
雑税 七萬貳千六百八拾五貫六百七拾九文
雑税（ざつぜい）七万二千六百八十五貫六百七十九文
Miscellaneous tax = 72,685 kan 679 mon, expressed in cash (kan/mon) rather than rice koku. A sub-line (内) immediately to its left itemises the product-tax portion.
雜稅
内 産物税 八千五百五拾壹貫貳拾六文
内（うち）産物税（さんぶつぜい）八千五百五十一貫二十六文
Of the miscellaneous tax (内 = 'of which'), the product/commodity-tax portion = 8,551 kan 26 mon — the share of zatsuzei levied on domain products.
内 産物税
附紙 校訂者云 原書◎ニ關スル記載 外ニ記ス
附紙（ふせん）校訂者云ふ — 原書、◎に関する記載は外に記す

Editorial attached-slip (fusen) note from the 1928 collator: the description concerning the ◎ marker in the original manuscript is recorded separately. A provenance/editorial annotation, not domain data.
Collator note (附紙 校訂者云)
豐凶平均シ凡ソ三分ノ歳入ト見做シ現米十萬九千五百八十一石五升三合）
豊凶平均し、凡そ三分の歳入と見做し、現米十万九千五百八十一石五升三合）

Collator's calculation note: averaging good and bad harvests and reckoning revenue at roughly one-third (三分) of the kusadaka, net rice (gen-mai) is estimated at 109,581 koku 5 sho 3 go. (366,271 x 1/3 ~= 122k; the note's 109,581 reflects the actual computed figure.) The closing 升三合） wraps into the short column to its left.
Collator note (gen-mai estimate)
升三合）
…升三合）
Tail of the gen-mai estimate that wraps from the bottom of the adjacent note column to the top of this short column: '...sho 3 go)', closing the parenthetical.
Gen-mai note wrap (升三合)
戸數 五萬○三拾七軒
戸数（こすう）五万三十七軒

Total households = 50,037 (五萬三拾七軒, with implied zeros in the thousands/hundreds places). This grand total equals the sum of the breakdown that follows: 45,727 + 948 + 2,383 + 422 + 255 + 55 + 247 = 50,037 (exact).
戸數
内 士族九百四十八戸 寺院二百四十七ヶ寺 卒二千三百八十三戸 穢多四百二十二軒 社人二百五十五… 非人五十五軒
内（うち）士族948戸・寺院247ヶ寺・卒2,383戸・穢多422軒・社人255…・非人55軒

Itemised breakdown (内) of the 50,037 households: samurai (士族) 948 houses, temples (寺院) 247, sotsu (卒, lower retainers) 2,383, eta (穢多) 422, shrine-servants (社人) 255, and hinin (非人) 55. Together with the 45,727 directly-administered commoner households to the left, these sum exactly to the 50,037 total.
内 士族
支配地戸數 四萬五千七百二十七戸 但シ寺院…
支配地戸数（しはいちこすう）四万五千七百二十七戸（但し寺院…）

Households of the directly-administered territory = 45,727 戸, the commoner base. This is the largest component of the 50,037 grand total; the trailing 但シ寺院 gloss flags the temple count handled in the breakdown block.
支配地戸數
校訂者云 原書◎欄外ニアリ
校訂者云ふ — 原書、◎は欄外にあり
Second editorial gloss from the collator, hanging beside the 支配地戸數 column: in the original manuscript the ◎ mark is in the margin (欄外). A provenance note about the source layout, not domain data.
Collator note (校訂者云 欄外ニアリ)
